title: conyza spinellosa
intro: Conyza spinellosa, also known as Spiny Fleabane or Spiny Cudweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Conyza spinellosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Conyza spinellosa can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine.
